title: Community Poll: Direct flights from George to Hoedspruit
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Are you interested in...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Are you interested in direct flights between George and Hoedspruit?

George, the gateway to the scenic Garden Route, is a hub for both tourists and locals.


> Do you think a direct connection to Hoedspruit, the gateway to the bush and wildlife adventures, is a good idea?


Link to the poll

Currently, the best route involves a stopover at Johannesburg OR Tambo International Airport or Cape Town International Airport.


> Michael Bailey, a local from George and a keen naturalist, and many other Garden Route residents enjoy family breakaways to the Kruger National Park to experience its rich wildlife.


That is why Baily is exploring the demand for direct flights between George and Hoedspruit.

He believes a direct connection to Hoedspruit will be beneficial for many.


> Bailey's poll


Bailey has created a short poll on Microsoft Forms to gauge public opinion about a direct route in order to give feedback to Airlink. Please take a moment to answer just 7 multiple choice questions by clicking here.

Thank you for participating! Your feedback is invaluable in helping Bailey assess the demand for this potential new route.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
